title: DR GARDEN Garden Tools Set, Gardening Kit (10pcs), Hand Tools for Gardener, Planting Accessories, Jardineer Equipment with Case, Green (JM-201)
features: 🌱COMPREHENSIVE GARDENING SET: This hard case contains the following gardening accessories. Pruning Tools, Sprayer, Pickaxe, Shovel, Rake, Spade, Digging Tools, Cleaning Tools, Hoe, Scraper. Everything you need to care for your garden.
🌱DURABLE AND RESISTANT: Made with carbon steel material, this gardening set combines quality and durability. The high-quality material prevent rust and damages.
🌱MULTIFUNCTIONAL TOOLS: This garden kit provides all the tools you need for digging, transplanting, weeding, loosening soil or spraying. The portable case is lightweight and easy to carry.
🌱ERGONOMIC HANDLE: The plastic handles improve your grips strength and reduce fatigue of hands and arms, making your planting job more comfortable.
🌱PROFESSIONAL MANUFACTURER: Produced by a manufacturer with 35 years experience in garden accessories.
description: Garden Tools Kit (10pcs) with Case TOOLS INCLUDED Pruning shears Sprayer Pickaxe 2x Shovels Rake Spade Trowel Hoe Scraper MATERIAL Stainless steel head Ergonomic, easy-to-grip plastic handle Anti-rust iron paint WHY WE ARE BETTER 10-in-1 Gardening kit. Everything you need for your garden activities Durable and resistant tools set Reduce fatigue and make planting faster and more comfortable Lightweight case let you carry the tools with ease and store them when not in use Beautiful and fashionable design makes it a perfect gift for gardening lovers.
